description: Split terminals into a grid layout in a single editor tab — tmux-like panes powered by xterm.js + node-pty
viewContainer.title: Terminal Grid
view.name: Terminal Grid
config.title: Terminal Grid
config.fontFamily: Terminal font family override (empty = follow IDE theme)
config.backgroundColor: Terminal background color override (empty = follow IDE theme)
config.foregroundColor: Terminal foreground color override (empty = follow IDE theme)
config.colorTheme: Terminal color theme (empty = follow IDE theme)
config.shellType: Default shell type (empty = auto-detect from OS/environment)
config.apiPort: HTTP API port for MCP bridge (0 = disabled). Restart required.
